ministries.title: Kingdom Statesmen
ministries.description: Dedicated to building godly men through fellowship, accountability, and biblical teaching. We believe that strong men build strong families and communities.

ministries.title: Women of Influence
ministries.description: Empowering women to grow in faith and community through mentorship and support. We create a space for every woman to flourish in her calling.

ministries.title: Support Ministry
ministries.description: Our support team ensures that every member of our congregation feels seen and cared for through hospital visits, meal trains, and counseling.

ministries.title: Worship Team
ministries.description: Leading the congregation into the presence of God through music and song. We are a community of musicians and singers dedicated to excellence.

ministries.title: Media Team
ministries.description: Utilizing technology to spread the Gospel. From sound engineering to live streaming, we make the message of Christ accessible to all.

events.title: Sunday Worship Service
events.description: Join us for a powerful time of worship, prayer, and a life-changing word from God. We have one session to accommodate everyone in our community.

events.title: Mid-Week Bible Study
events.description: A mid-week recharge where we dive deeper into the scriptures. This is an interactive session designed to equip you for daily Christian living.

events.title: Prayer Sunday
events.description: Coming together as a global family to stand in the gap for our nations, our families, and our church. Expect a day of breakthrough and miracles.
